title: ERDCWERX
description: ERDCWERX provides a streamlined path to collaboration and contracting with the U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC).
text:
Home
ERDCWERX provides a streamlined path to collaboration and contracting with the U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC).
Our events, tech challenges, and other opportunities make it easier and faster for innovators to propose solutions for consideration by ERDC.
Advanced Polar Snow and Terrain Sensing
ERDC seeks advanced capabilities for sensing and predicting operationally relevant variables in polar and subpolar snowpack and terrain surface stability.
Learn How to Participate
ERDC Innovation: Harvest the Power of ERDC Patents
Seeking to grow your business? Visit our new patent promotion website—a resource for licensing ERDC IP.
30,000+
As a result of our partnership with ERDC, a growing number of contracts and agreements are being awarded to industry and academia.
How it WERX
Innovate
Our events, tech challenges, and other opportunities make it easy for industry and academia to quickly engage with ERDC with innovative ideas and solutions.
Collaborate
Our collaboration space accommodates the facilitation of project design and brainstorming sessions between innovators and subject matter experts.
Accelerate
We support the acceleration of research, prototype development, IP commercialization, and other collaboration between innovators and ERDC.
“Our partnership intermediary, ERDCWERX, creates opportunities for industry, academia, and others in the federal government to collaborate with ERDC research teams. In our years of working together, we have a proven track record of quickly transitioning and delivering the innovative technologies and solutions that support our nation and the Warfighter.”
— Dr. Beth Fleming, Director
U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC)
